nodes.context: Camorra clan operating in the western suburbs of Naples, specifically Bacoli and Monte di Procida.
Camorra clan founded by Paolo Di Lauro, operating in Secondigliano and Scampia areas of Naples.
Splinter group from the Di Lauro clan, involved in the first Scampia feud.

edges.context: Clan Pariante was originally the second-in-command and treasurer of the Di Lauro clan, helping to found it.
Clan Pariante led the split from the Di Lauro clan, forming the Scissionisti di Secondigliano.
The Scissionisti fought the Di Lauro clan in the first Scampia feud, with killings and attacks.
